content.finding: Lag-1 autocorrelation of resp_z: mean = +0.983, std = 0.008, min = +0.952, max = +0.995. ALL 72 cells above 0.95
content.evidence: Empirical measurement across full cell population
implications: Delta_rz = resp_z(t) - resp_z(t-1) is a clean, informative second-order signal (not noise)
Second-order temporal signals are viable for Stage 3 meta-learning
